title: OSP Profile: General Logistics v1
description: Vocabulary for freight and shipping services that are not specialised in temperature-controlled cargo. Covers transport modes, unit types, hazardous-goods capability, equipment, customs handling, and tracking depth. Composable with 'cold-chain-logistics' for providers that offer both generic and refrigerated freight.

transport_modes.description: Modes of carriage the provider operates. LTL vs FTL is the primary split for road.

service_scope.description: Geographic scope. A provider may serve several; missing scopes are hard exclusions.

unit_types.description: Standard load units the provider accepts and handles. EUR/CP codes follow the European EPAL / CHEP conventions.

hazmat_classes.description: Dangerous-goods classes the provider is authorised to transport (ADR / IMDG / IATA numbering). 'none' means no hazmat; 'lq_only' means limited quantities only.

equipment_types.description: Vehicle and equipment types in the provider's fleet or subcontractor pool.

pickup_delivery_mode.description: Pickup/delivery configurations supported. Determines what the customer must arrange on either end.

customs_services.description: Customs-related services the provider offers in-house (as opposed to subcontracting).

time_definite_services.description: Time-definite service classes. 'timed_delivery_window' means guaranteed delivery within a narrow window (e.g., 09:00-11:00).

track_and_trace_depth.description: Tracking granularity. 'realtime_with_sensors' implies temperature/humidity/shock data, though temperature specifics belong in the cold-chain profile.

proof_of_delivery_types.description: POD formats available to the customer on delivery.

insurance_coverage.description: Default liability regime. CMR-statutory is the legal minimum for international road in most of Europe and is usually insufficient for high-value goods.

customs_bonded_warehouse_available.description: Whether the provider operates a bonded warehouse, allowing goods to be held under customs control without import duty payment.
